name: A Helping Hand. [The Knocker]
description:
“Fuck you!”

“...Would you?”

I wanted to write The Knocker again so I grabbed a buncha ideas off of Pinterest...

So basically yr fighting a horde of mobs and call out to no one in particular for help. Little did you know, your savior turned out to be that annoying fucking stalker you’ve seen creeping around the perimeter of your house lately. At least he offered to patch you up? Eheh... heh heh...

Disclaimers: This prompt will include vivid descriptions of blood & gore. To add, as always, The Knocker is your stalker, so anything twisted you can think of would come out of a non-human stalker is very possible.

The introduction is VERRY LOOONGG, so I hope u like reading. Sorry—

I guess this kinda falls into enemies-to-lovers trope. Maybe — that is if you don’t fall for his bullshit LMAO.

update: I added a second greeting option where you guys are still in the woods
creator: solstic333
